name: FeatureCardTwentySeven
description: Interactive flip cards with 3D rotation effect. Front shows title, icon, and media; back reveals description.

buttonRules.note: Button variant is controlled by ThemeProvider's defaultButtonVariant.

structure.title: string - Card title on both sides (required)
structure.description: string - Description shown on back side (required)
structure.imageSrc: string - Path to image (optional if videoSrc provided)
structure.videoSrc: string - Path to video (optional if imageSrc provided)

featureRules.note: Each feature requires id, title, description, and media (image or video). Cards flip to reveal description on click.

propsSchema.features: FeatureCard[] (required) - Array with id, title, description, imageSrc/videoSrc
propsSchema.title: string

usageExample:
<ThemeProvider defaultButtonVariant="icon-arrow" borderRadius="rounded">
  <FeatureCardTwentySeven
    title="Our Services"
    description="Discover what makes us different."
    tag="Services"
    tagIcon={Sparkles}
    textboxLayout="default"
    useInvertedBackground="noInvert"
    gridVariant="uniform-4-items"
    animationType="slide-up"
    features={[
      {
        id: "1",
        title: "Web Development",
        description: "Custom websites built with modern technologies.",
        imageSrc: "/service1.jpg",
        imageAlt: "Web Development"
      },
      {
        id: "2",
        title: "Mobile Apps",
        description: "Native and cross-platform applications.",
        imageSrc: "/service2.jpg",
        imageAlt: "Mobile Apps"
      }
    ]}
  />
</ThemeProvider>
do: Use for interactive feature showcases where exploration is desired
Use high-quality images or videos for the front side
Keep descriptions concise for back side readability
dont: Do not use without media for each feature
Do not use for text-heavy content on front side
Do not use for more than 8 items
